subject: Holiday poster — signed agreement + invoice INV-HD-010
body_preview: Henry, contract is signed on our end and the poster is a go at the four hundred we agreed. Sending payment net-30 after the final. Invoice INV-HD-010 received, thanks.

subject: Re: Holiday poster — final delivery timing
body_preview: Just confirming the four hundred is still outstanding on our side until the final art lands. Accounting will cut the check once it does.

subject: Payment sent — Dawnstone spring single cover
body_preview: Cover looks incredible. Payout sent through the usual card processor for the five hundred, should hit your account in a couple days. Invoice marked paid on my end.

subject: Cafe menu illustration — approved, invoice received
body_preview: Owner signed off on the menu art. We processed the two fifty. Let me know if the deposit shows up on your side.

subject: Print order receipt — risograph set
body_preview: Got the prints, they are gorgeous. Confirming the order went through on the storefront and the card was charged.
